name: Clazakizumab dialysis IL-6 phase 2b trial
summary: A randomized phase 2b dose-finding trial of IL-6 ligand inhibition in maintenance dialysis patients with elevated hsCRP.
population: Adults receiving maintenance dialysis with cardiovascular disease and/or diabetes and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Cytokine and Inflammasome Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in Adults receiving maintenance dialysis with cardiovascular disease and/or diabetes and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
